title: Elegance: ZWS_CHARS constant name is vague; consider ZERO_WIDTH_CHARS or ZERO_WIDTH_INVISIBLE_CHARS
description: The constant name 'ZWS_CHARS' uses an unfamiliar acronym (Zero Width Space). More explicit names like ZERO_WIDTH_CHARS or ZERO_WIDTH_INVISIBLE_CHARS would improve discoverability and reduce cognitive load for maintainers unfamiliar with Unicode terminology. BIDI_CONTROLS is already clear by comparison.
close_reason: Renamed ZWS_CHARS to ZERO_WIDTH_CHARS for clarity
